name: @lesto/example-mcp-server
description: An authenticated, production-shaped remote MCP server: agents reach the Lesto control plane over HTTP behind a real OAuth bearer token validated against an external IdP's JWKS (jose) — RFC 9728 discovery, the audience no-passthrough guard, and the mcp:write scope ceiling that floors a read-only token to read-only mode while an operator token unlocks the destructive tools.
